title: Sqlitelogictest division by zero on COALESCE call
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_division (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value1 INTEGER, value2 INTEGER, value3 INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_division (value1, value2, value3) VALUES (10, 0, 5);
INSERT INTO test_division (value1, value2, value3) VALUES (20, 1, NULL);
SELECT COALESCE(value1 / NULLIF(value2, 0), value3) FROM test_division WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COALESCE(value1 / NULLIF(value2, 0), value3) FROM test_division WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: Division by zero in COALESCE function
